hero.title: Expert Podiatry
hero.subtitle: Walk with ease again: solving foot problems where others can’t.

about.title: Podiatry & Orthopedics in Chisinau
about.subtitle: Treating the Cause, Not Just the Symptom
about.intro: At our two specialized studios, we offer more than just a pedicure—we focus on restoring your foot's natural biomechanics.

items.title: An Orthopedic Approach
items.description: 90% of foot issues recur if walking mechanics aren't corrected. We bridge the gap between podiatry and orthopedics to ensure long-term health.

items.title: Evgenia’s Signature Designs
items.description: Our custom orthotics (insoles) feature a wider 'toe box' design. Unlike narrow, mass-produced versions, they don’t crowd your toes; they distribute weight evenly and improve circulation.

result.heading: The Result:
result.description: Permanent pain relief, prevention of future issues, and an effortless stride with every step.

top_services.title: Services
top_services.description: Discover our most popular services, designed to address the most common foot and ankle concerns.

podiatric_consultation.title: Podiatric Consultation
podiatric_consultation.description: Comprehensive evaluation of foot mechanics to pinpoint the exact cause of pain or discomfort. Essential for creating a tailor-made treatment plan.

medical_pedicure.title: Medical Pedicure
medical_pedicure.description: A safe, sterile treatment focusing on the health of your nails and skin. Perfect for treating calluses, ingrown nails, and fungal infections.

orthopedic_insoles.title: Custom Orthopedic Insoles
orthopedic_insoles.description: Bespoke insoles crafted with Evgenia’s signature wide toe box design, ensuring optimal weight distribution and corrected biomechanics.

specialists.title: Our Team
specialists.subtitle: Masters of your wellness journey
specialists.description: Meet our highly qualified specialists dedicated to providing you with the best care.
